data.name: High-level programming and control for industrial robotics: using a hand-held accelerometer-based input device for gesture and posture recognition

data.description: High-level programming and control for industrial robotics: using a hand-held accelerometer-based input device for gesture and posture recognition uses Gazebo.
High-level programming and control for industrial robotics: using a hand-held accelerometer-based input device for gesture and posture recognition uses ROS 2 Middleware.
High-level programming and control for industrial robotics: using a hand-held accelerometer-based input device for gesture and posture recognition uses MoveIt Motion Planning.
